portrait_styles.name: ARTISTIC_PORTRAIT premium artistic portrait
portrait_styles.prompt:
Use ChatGPT image generation to create the final edited image now from the attached photo. Generate the actual image; do not answer with text. Do not write a prompt, description, explanation, checklist, or instructions. Return only one generated image file in the chat.

ARTISTIC_PORTRAIT:
Create a premium artistic portrait based on the uploaded source photo.

Main goal:
carefully isolate the main subject or subjects from the original image and transform them into a beautiful cinematic fine-art photograph that positively enhances the original scene while preserving its real emotional atmosphere.

CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS:
— strictly preserve the real identity of all people
— keep the original facial structure, eyes, nose, lips, age, expression, hairstyle, and natural features
— do NOT replace people with idealized AI faces
— maintain 100% recognizability
— preserve the emotional authenticity and spirit of the original photo

Style:
— elegant artistic photography
— cinematic composition
— warm positive atmosphere
— emotionally uplifting mood
— realistic premium photography look
— natural beauty and realism
— visually rich but believable
— soft cinematic lighting
— subtle depth of field
— realistic skin texture
— expressive natural eyes
— detailed hair and clothing
— gentle professional retouching without plastic skin
— natural colors with beautiful tonal balance
— harmonious background separation with soft bokeh
— museum-quality artistic portrait
— DSLR photography aesthetic
— ultra realistic
— highly detailed
— 8K quality

IMPORTANT:
Enhance the beauty, emotion, and artistic impact of the original photograph without changing the real people, their personalities, or the truthful feeling of the scene.

Final output: one finished premium artistic portrait image. No text, no watermark, no frame, no collage.

portrait_styles.name: PHOTO_PORTRET ultra-realistic premium photo portrait
portrait_styles.prompt:
Use ChatGPT image generation to create the final edited image now from the attached photo. Generate the actual image; do not answer with text. Do not write a prompt, description, explanation, checklist, or instructions. Return only one generated image file in the chat.

PHOTO_PORTRET:
Create an ultra-realistic high-quality photo portrait based on the uploaded source photo.

Main goal:
carefully isolate the main subject or subjects from the original photo and transform the image into a premium professional artistic photo portrait.

CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS:
- strictly preserve each person's real identity
- preserve the face, eye shape, nose, lips, age, emotion, expression, and natural features
- do not replace the person with an idealized AI model
- maintain 100% recognizability

Create:
- professional studio photo portrait
- very high detail in skin, eyes, hair, and clothing
- natural premium retouching without plastic skin
- cinematic lighting
- soft depth of field
- expressive focus on the face
- beautiful separation between the subject and the background
- natural bokeh background
- premium photography look
- realistic DSLR photo
- ultra detailed
- 8K quality
- natural skin texture
- realistic eyes
- cinematic color grading

If the photo contains several people:
- keep only the main subjects when appropriate
- arrange them in a beautiful natural composition
- preserve natural poses and interaction
- remove random secondary people and unnecessary distracting objects

Background:
- clean
- artistic
- premium
- realistic
- not distracting
- softly blurred if appropriate
- consistent with the atmosphere of the source photo

Style:
- modern professional portrait photography
- Vogue / Vanity Fair / cinematic portrait style
- soft dimensional light
- natural colors
- refined contrast

Avoid:
- cartoon style
- CGI
- excessive beauty filter
- plastic skin
- extra fingers
- distorted anatomy
- fake smile
- over-sharpening
- text
- watermark
- frame
- collage

The final result must look like an expensive professional photo session shot by a top photographer with a premium camera.
